creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The port fails to build on CURRENT's poudriere (FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #196 r329679: Tue Feb 20 23:06:15 CET 2018 amd64), host and jail are of the same version/revision.

[...]
/usr/local/bin/perl /wrkdirs/usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-de/work/doc/share/misc/epsgeom -offset 100 100 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-de/work/doc/de_DE.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/../../../share/images/books/handbook/advanced-networking/net-routing.eps  | /usr/local/bin/gs -q -dBATCH -dGraphicsAlphaBits=4 -dTextAlphaBits=4  -dEPSCrop -r100x100  -dNOPAUSE -dSAFER -sDEVICE=pnm -sOutputFile=-  -g`/usr/local/bin/perl /wrkdirs/usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-de/work/doc/share/misc/epsgeom -geom 100 100 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-de/work/doc/de_DE.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/../../../share/images/books/handbook/advanced-networking/net-routing.eps` -  | /usr/local/bin/pnmtopng > /wrkdirs/usr/ports/misc/freebsd-doc-de/work/doc/de_DE.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/../../../share/images/books/handbook/advanced-networking/net-routing.png
